creator: yuri@irfu.se
text:
Here the contents of my /etc/nsswitch.conf:

#
# nsswitch.conf(5) - name service switch configuration file
# $FreeBSD: src/etc/nsswitch.conf,v 1.1.10.1 2009/08/03 08:13:06 kensmith Exp $
#
group: files ldap
hosts: files dns
networks: files
passwd: files ldap
shells: files
services: compat
services_compat: nis
protocols: files
rpc: files
